metadata.thoughts:
**Reflecting on dates and formats**

I realize that June 20, 2020, was a Saturday. It seems that June 20, 2025, is indeed a Friday, while June 20, 2024, falls on a Thursday because of the leap year. Next, June 20, 2026, will be a Saturday. The upcoming Friday, June 20, is in the past when compared to my current date of March 9, 2026. I ponder the best approach for filling in a required date format without guessing the year.
